checks.reason: The node is scoped to about 500,000-year-old hafted stone-point spears from Kathu Pan 1.
The scoped artifacts are manufactured stone points used as spear tips.
The source-backed KP1 stone-point scope should not depend on the later broad advanced_stone_tools placeholder.
The KP1 source documents stone-point spear tips, not bone-tool manufacture as a direct prerequisite.
The current cordage node is later than the KP1 hafting claim and is not documented by the source.
The KP1 source supports hafting but does not document adhesive production as a prerequisite.
The current woodworking_basic node is later-dated and should not be used as a direct prerequisite for the earlier KP1 claim.
